name: Embervale Settlement
inside: Bath halls, repair shops, ration kitchens, bunk compounds, and shift boards structure a life built around rotation, recovery, and rapid redeployment.
interior_patterns: labor recovery is visibly part of daily life.
small heat-shrine observances and achievement toasts mark survival, endurance, and return to duty
The difference between who belongs, who is tolerated, and who draws scrutiny becomes legible quickly once inside.
